message:
feat(random): add LOGFACT table and implement NumPy-compatible hypergeometric/zipf/multinomial

Add the 126-entry LOGFACT precomputed log-factorial table matching
NumPy's logfactorial.c for bit-exact parity. Implement hypergeometric
sampling via the H2PE (Hyp2PeExponential) algorithm with cached
precomputed parameters, matching NumPy's random_hypergeometric. Add
zipf sampling via the rejection algorithm matching NumPy's
random_zipf. Add multinomial sampling built on the corrected binomial
BTPE implementation.

Update conformance expected values and un-ignore oracle tests for
hypergeometric, zipf, and multinomial now that algorithms match NumPy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
